Figure 11 - The audio streams in this Transport Pattern are:
2 channels of 48 kHz × 24 bits (D1 and D2).
4 channels of 48 kHz × 16 bits (D3, D4, D5, and D6).
3 channels of 3.072 MHz × 1 bit; latency = 326 ns (D7, D8, and D9).
The SSP Rate in this example is 48 kHz because the pattern repeats every 64 Rows.
